tasks.prompt: Create a public-safe future work planning artifact for Project Athernex. Add or update docs/planning/neuroplexis-future-tasks.md with a concise backlog of future tasks for Kafka broker power scheduling, Rust orchestration, Paperclip routine integration, Kubernetes scheduling contracts, tests, and public/private boundary hygiene. Do not add secrets, private topology, credentials, private network inventories, BMC/IPMI details, or destructive power procedures.
